title: Tree Bark
description: Tree Bark drops bark from trees when they are debarked.
body:
This mod adds bark from Vanilla trees to the game that is obtained when debarking (drop number configurable).
This bark can be used as fuel, for crafting paper or can be reattached to the corresponding tree trunk by right-clicking.
- minimum of bark in hand = drop from block e.g.: Oak Log dropped 4 = 4 for rebark, Oak Wood dropped 6 = 6 for rebark.

Addons:
          [Bark O'Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/bark-o-plenty),
          [Biomes Barkover](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-barkover),
          [Blue Skies Bark](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies-bark),
          [Ecobarkics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecobarkics)
